qualifying_jobs.title: Director of Personalization, Apple Intelligence
qualifying_jobs.summary: Lead a diverse team responsible for defining and building personalized Apple Intelligence experiences from ML models to infrastructure and UI. Oversees managers leading multidisciplinary engineering teams across multiple technical domains. Defines and drives technical strategy for personalized OS experiences across apps, services, and system features. Closes May 27 2026.
qualifying_jobs.verification: OPEN (verified via evenbreak.com mirror — Apple jobs.apple.com is JS-rendered)

qualifying_jobs.title: Senior Director, Engineering, Merchant Shopping
qualifying_jobs.location: Mountain View, California, US (also Reston VA, Atlanta GA)
qualifying_jobs.summary: Responsible for the multi-year roadmap, strategy, and execution of products that form the foundation of the merchant experience. Leads engineering team to build and scale marquee products like Google Merchant Center. Develops innovative generative AI experiences such as Google Product Studio. Manages critical partnerships with the retail ecosystem.
qualifying_jobs.verification: UNCERTAIN (google.com careers is JS-rendered — cross-verified via independent WebSearch indexing the role on google.com/about/careers)

qualifying_jobs.title: Director of Engineering, Experience
qualifying_jobs.salary: Not listed (Spotify Director ~SEK 1.0M+ base, ~$531K avg total per Glassdoor)
qualifying_jobs.summary: Own the Engineering function of the 'Identity & Investment' product area in the Consumer Experience Mission — a team of ~70 engineers responsible for the adaptive product experience across iOS and Android that makes Spotify better the more it's used. Define and implement product/tech strategy supporting the goal of 1B+ users. Per Spotify's career ladder, Director on the Engineering Manager track maps to L8.
qualifying_jobs.verification: OPEN (verified via Lever API pull from career monitor; cross-confirmed via WebSearch showing role indexed on multiple job aggregators)
